validations.name: Enter the locality name.
validations.coordinates: Enter valid coordinates in latitude,longitude format.

plate_sending.description: Manage integrations that receive LPR reads and review the operational status of linked cameras.

plate_sending.description_fallback: No operational description has been configured for this integration.

prf.identifier_help: Define the camera.number field per direction for cameras sent to PRF.

stats.codes_desc: Distinct connectors available in this hub.

stats.configured_desc: Cameras already linked to this integration.

form.add_description: Configure the operational data of this camera for the {integration} integration.
form.edit_description: Update the identifiers and direction filter used by the {integration} integration.
form.direction_help: Define whether the camera sends both directions or just one of them.
form.identifier_placeholder: If empty, the system will use the camera name.
form.identifier_help: If nothing is informed, the backend falls back to the camera name.
form.custom_identifier_help: Configurable integrations do not require a legacy identifier at this stage.

delete_dialog.description: Do you want to remove camera {camera} from this integration?

tokens.title: Camera tokens
tokens.description: Manage the tokens used by camera {camera} to receive LPR reads.
tokens.generated_description: Copy the token below and configure it on the camera or the remote integrator.
tokens.empty: No tokens have been generated for this camera.

logs.title: Sending logs - {camera}
logs.description: Inspect sent requests, integration errors, and exchanged payloads.
logs.details_description: Review the outgoing payload and the integration response.
logs.empty: No logs were found for this camera.

test.title: Realtime monitor
test.description: Follow the events from camera {camera} while it sends reads to {integration}.
test.empty_console: Click connect and then start monitoring to begin.
test.empty_raw: No raw data has been received yet.

notifications.token_missing: No authentication token was found in the browser.
notifications.waiting_description: Send data to the webhook to see events here in realtime.
notifications.start_error: Could not start monitoring for this camera.

studio.title: Configurable integrations
studio.description: Register editable destinations, shape the outgoing payload, and configure how each camera saves the received read.

integrations.search_placeholder: Search by name, code, description, or endpoint...

form.edit_description: Update endpoint, headers, and delivery structure for this integration.

form.name: Name
form.headers_help: Define the HTTP headers sent with the request (JSON).
form.request_skeleton_help: Define the JSON structure to be sent. Values will be filled per camera via field mapping.

cameras.search_placeholder: Search camera by name, IP, totem, or point...
cameras.not_found: No cameras were found for configuration.

dialog.title: Camera configuration
dialog.description: Define how the received read is saved to the database and which payload paths can be used.

form.enabled_help: When disabled, the camera can still send through the legacy flow, but editable mapping is turned off.
form.sample_payload_help: This is the latest request received from the camera. Capture a new one to update.
form.db_mapping_help: Map each database field to the corresponding path in the camera's JSON.

empty.payload: No sample has been captured for this camera yet.
